recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial and consumer paints including masonry, stucco paints, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings; low bake (Low E) powder coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業和消費類油漆，包括磚石、灰泥漆、建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；地板塗料；低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polypropylene gives good film durability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Provides consistent medium textured coating surface to reduce gloss.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Does not lower COF; ideal for anti-skid surfaces.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provides a consistent medium textured coating surface. Adds texture in low bake (Low E) powder coatings. Easy to disperse powder.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚丙烯提供良好的漆膜耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 提供一致的中等織紋塗層表面以降低光澤。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 不降低摩擦係數 (COF)；非常適合防滑表面。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 提供一致的中等織紋塗層表面。在低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料中增加織紋。易分散的粉末。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based, industrial coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型、工業塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings including metal, plastics and masonry, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings; low bake (Low E) powder coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料，包括金屬、塑料和磚石；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；地板塗料；低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired (on total formula weight)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-5.0%（視所需的消光程度而定，佔總配方重量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polypropylene gives good durability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Provides gloss reduction with improved burnish resistance vs. silica.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Does not lower COF; ideal for anti-skid surfaces.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Adds a mild texture effect to the coating surface. Narrow cut mean particle size grades available for maximum texture control. Adds texture in low bake (Low E) powder coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚丙烯提供良好的耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 提供消光效果，與二氧化矽相比具有更好的抗拋光性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 不降低摩擦係數 (COF)；非常適合防滑表面。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 為塗層表面增添溫和的織紋效果。可提供窄粒徑分佈級別以實現最佳織紋控制。在低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料中增加織紋。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based, industrial coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型、工業塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings including metal, plastics and masonry, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings; low bake (Low E) powder coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料，框架金屬、塑料和磚石；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；地板塗料；低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired (on total formula weight)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-5.0%（視所需的消光程度而定，佔總配方重量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polypropylene gives good durability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Provides gloss reduction with improved burnish resistance vs. silica.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Does not lower COF; ideal for anti-skid surfaces.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Adds a mild texture effect to the coating surface. Narrow cut mean particle size grades available for maximum texture control. Adds texture in low bake (Low E) powder coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚丙烯提供良好的耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 提供消光效果，與二氧化矽相比具有更好的抗拋光性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 不降低摩擦係數 (COF)；非常適合防滑表面。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 為塗層表面增添溫和的織紋效果。可提供窄粒徑分佈級別以實現最佳織紋控制。在低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料中增加織紋。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based, industrial coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型、工業塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings including metal, plastics and masonry, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料，包括金屬、塑料和磚石；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；地板塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired (on total formula weight)

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polypropylene gives good durability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Provides gloss reduction with improved burnish resistance vs. silica.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Does not lower COF; ideal for anti-skid surfaces.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Adds a mild texture effect to the coating surface. Narrow cut mean particle size grade available for maximum texture control. For a finer texture, try PropylMatte 31.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚丙烯提供良好的耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 提供消光效果，與二氧化矽相比具有更好的抗拋光性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 不降低摩擦係數 (COF)；非常適合防滑表面。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 為塗層表面增添溫和的織紋效果。可提供窄粒徑分佈級別以實現最佳織紋控制。如需更細的織紋，可嘗試 PropylMatte 31。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial and consumer paints including masonry, stucco paints, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業和消費類油漆，包括磚石、灰泥漆、建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；地板塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polypropylene gives good film durability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Provides a consistent coarse textured coating surface to reduce gloss.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Does not lower COF; ideal for anti-skid surfaces.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provides a consistent coarse textured coating surface. Easy to disperse powder that can be incorporated with high speed mixing.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚丙烯提供良好的漆膜耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 提供一致的粗糙織紋塗層表面以降低光澤。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 不降低摩擦係數 (COF)；非常適合防滑表面。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 提供一致的粗糙織紋塗層表面。易分散的粉末，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial and consumer paints including masonry, stucco paints, architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; floor coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 提供一致的粗糙織紋塗層表面。易分散的粉末，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based and solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性與溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including metal and masonry); powder coatings; coil coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括金屬與磚石）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料；地板塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 3.0% and higher depending on the level of texture desired (on total formula weight)
suggested_use_level_zh: 3.0% 或更高，視所需的織紋程度而定（佔總配方重量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Imparts surface toughness and durability. High melting point polymer is ideal for use in baking or high temperature curing systems.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provides a uniform and controlled surface texture. Easy to disperse fine powder that can be incorporated with high speed mixing. Adds texture in powder coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 賦予表面韌性與耐用性。高熔點聚合物非常適合用於烘烤或高溫固化體系。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 提供均勻且可控的表面織紋。易分散的細粉，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。在粉末塗料中增加織紋。

performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based and solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性與溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including metal and masonry); powder coatings; coil coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括金屬與磚石）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料；地板塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 3.0% and higher depending on the level of texture desired (on total formula weight)

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Imparts surface toughness and durability. High melting point polymer is ideal for use in baking or high temperature curing systems.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Provides a uniform and controlled surface texture. Easy to disperse fine powder that can be incorporated with high speed mixing. Adds texture in powder coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 賦予表面韌性與耐用性。高熔點聚合物非常適合用於烘烤或高溫固化體系。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 提供均勻且可控的表面織紋。易分散的細粉，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。在粉末塗料中增加織紋。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, vinyl and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; soft touch coatings; floor coatings; visual effects.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、乙烯基和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；觸感塗料；地板塗料；視覺效果。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-10.0% (higher amounts when greater tactile effects are desired)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-10.0%（若需要更強的觸感效果可增加用量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Highly resilient spherical polyurethane beads improve burnish, scratch and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Virtually indestructible elastic particles create a unique surface touch. Provide different tactile effects ranging from satiny smooth to rubbery to leathery in properly formulated coatings.
performance_descriptions_en.soft_touch: Highly resilient spherical polyurethane beads modify the tactile properties of formulated coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 高韌性球形聚氨酯微珠可提高抗拋光、抗刮傷和抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 幾不可破的彈性顆粒創造出獨特的表面觸感。在正確配製的塗料中提供從絲綢般光滑、橡膠感至皮革感等不同的觸感效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.soft_touch: 高韌性球形聚氨酯微珠可改變調配塗料的觸感特性。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, vinyl and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; soft touch coatings; floor coatings; visual effects.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、乙烯基和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；觸感塗料；地板塗料；視覺效果。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-10.0% (higher amounts when greater tactile effects are desired)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-10.0%（若需要更強的觸感效果可增加用量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Highly resilient spherical polyurethane beads improve burnish, scratch and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Virtually indestructible elastic particles create a unique surface touch. Provide different tactile effects ranging from satiny smooth to rubbery to leathery in properly formulated coatings.
performance_descriptions_en.soft_touch: Highly resilient spherical polyurethane beads modify the tactile properties of formulated coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 高韌性球形聚氨酯微珠可提高抗拋光、抗刮傷和抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 幾不可破的彈性顆粒創造出獨特的表面觸感。在正確配製的塗料中提供從絲綢般光滑、橡膠感至皮革感等不同的觸感效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.soft_touch: 高韌性球形聚氨酯微珠可改變調配塗料的觸感特性。

composition_zh: 巴西棕櫚蠟/高密度聚乙烯
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; seed coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；種子塗層。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Provides an excellent combination of slip, abrasion resistance, and scratch resistance. Ideal for applications where excellent gloss and clarity are required.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Provides excellent slip, scratch resistance and food release properties in metal packaging coatings.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Designed for clarity and gloss retention; reduces coil coating surface haze post-bake and water quench.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: In coil coatings, provides maximum slip for forming and fabrication of finished coil.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提供滑爽性、耐磨損性和抗刮傷性的優異結合。非常適合需要極佳光澤度和透明度的應用。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 在金屬包裝塗料中提供優異的滑爽性、抗刮傷性和食品脫模性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 專為保持透明度和光澤度而設計；可減少卷材塗層烘烤及水淬後的表面霧影。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 在卷材塗料中，為成品卷材的成型和加工提供最大的滑爽性。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; seed coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；種子塗層。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Provides surface lubricity and scratch resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: In seed coatings, improves anti-blocking, flow, and abrasion resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Does not adversely affect clarity or gloss.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Provides surface lubricity. 100% natural and biodegradable prime yellow refined carnauba wax.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提供表面潤滑性與抗刮傷性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 在種子塗層中，改善抗粘連性、流動性和耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 不會對透明度或光澤产生不利影響。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 提供表面潤滑性。100% 天然且可生物降解的一級黃色精製巴西棕櫚蠟。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；金屬粉末。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Micronized fatty amide wax provides scratch resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: High melting point to improve heat and block resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds slip, release and lubricity with an excellent surface feel. Lowers COF.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Reduces dust buildup on sanding belts and increases longevity in sanding sealers.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 微粉化脂肪醯胺蠟提供抗刮傷性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 高熔點可提高耐熱性和抗粘連性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加滑爽性、脫模性和潤滑性，並提供極佳的表面手感。降低摩擦係數 (COF)。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 減少砂帶上的粉塵堆積，延長打磨底漆的使用壽命。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based and solvent based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及溶劑型塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired (on total formula weight)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-5.0%（視所需的消光程度而定，佔總配方重量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Tough, high molecular weight polymer imparts burnish and abrasion resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Finely micronized polypropylene for efficient matting and gloss control. Provides consistent gloss reduction with no effect on coating viscosity.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts anti-slip properties. Density (0.89) ideal for solvent based systems.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Adds texture in low bake (Low E) powder coatings.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅韌的高分子量聚合物，可賦予良好的抗拋光性和耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 精細微粉化聚丙烯，用於高效消光和光澤控制。提供穩定的降光效果且不影響塗料黏度。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予防滑性能。密度 (0.89) 非常適合溶劑型系統。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 在低溫烘烤 (Low E) 粉末塗料中增加織紋。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性及能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal, masonry and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬、磚石和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；地板塗料。
suggested_use_level_en: 2.0-5.0% depending on the level of gloss reduction desired (on total formula weight)
suggested_use_level_zh: 2.0-5.0%（視所需的消光程度而定，佔總配方重量）

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Finely micronized densified polypropylene improves burnish resistance vs. silica mattifiers.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Particle density optimized to essentially eliminate flotation or settling in most water based systems, ensuring superior in-can stability.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Efficient gloss reduction from satin to matte finish.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts anti-slip properties.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: For more efficient matting with a fine microtexture, try PropylTex 325HD/270HD.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 精細微粉化的加重聚丙烯與二氧化矽消光劑相比，提高了抗拋光性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 優化顆粒密度，在大多數水性系統中基本上消除了漂浮或沉降，確保了優異的罐內穩定性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 高效降低光澤，可實現從半光到啞光的表面效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予防滑性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 如需具備精細微織紋的高效消光，可嘗試 PropylTex 325HD/270HD。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based coatings and inks. Specifically formulated for stability in water based paints and coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性塗料及油墨。專為提高在水性油漆與塗料中的穩定性而配製。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; floor coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和長效光油（OPV，包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝及容器塗料；地板塗料。
interior_exterior_en: Interior and exterior applications. Will not powder or chalk in exterior applications.
interior_exterior_zh: 室內與室外應用。在戶外應用中不會粉化或起霜。
suggested_use_level_en: 0.5-2.0% (mar and abrasion resistance); 2.0-5.0% (gloss control) (on total formula weight)

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Improves mar, scratch and metal marking resistance. High efficiency at 0.5-2.0%.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Uniform gloss reduction with good burnish resistance in low or medium gloss finishes. Low density will keep silica matting additives in suspension.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts a smooth surface 'feel'.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提高抗刮傷、抗劃痕和抗金屬劃痕性能。在 0.5-2.0% 的添加量下具有高效能。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 在低或中光澤塗層中提供均勻的消光效果，並具備良好的抗拋光性。低密度特性有助於保持二氧化矽消光劑的懸浮穩定性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予平滑的表面「觸感」。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

composition_zh: 改性氧化高密度聚乙烯
recommended_system_type_en: Solvent and water based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 溶劑型與水性塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；卷材塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: PTFE-free alternative (Compare to AquaPolyfluo 411 without PTFE).
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: A synergistic blend of high molecular weight waxes including polyethylene provides optimum levels of scuff and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.improved_extrusion_flow: Easy to disperse fine powder that can be incorporated into aqueous paints, inks and coatings with high speed mixing.
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Provides optimum levels of scuff and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Provides optimum levels of scuff and mar resistance along with excellent slip and mobility.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 不含 PTFE 的替代選擇（效能等同不含 PTFE 的 AquaPolyfluo 411）。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 包含聚乙烯在內的高分子量蠟之協同混合物，可提供最佳水平的抗擦傷與抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.improved_extrusion_flow: 易分散的細粉，可透過高速攪拌混合引入水性油漆、油墨與塗料中。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 提供最佳水平的抗擦傷與抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 提供最佳水平的抗擦傷和抗劃痕性能，並具有優異的滑爽性與移動性。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

examples: AKZO- 罐頭塗料,Grace- 罐頭塗料
composition_zh: 改性氧化高密度聚乙烯
recommended_system_type_en: Water based coatings.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性塗料。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；卷材塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: A hard, high density modified polyethylene blend provides outstanding rub, mar and scratch resistance in aqueous systems.
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Provides outstanding rub, mar and scratch resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds slip properties.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 堅硬的高密度改性聚乙烯混合物，可在水性系統中提供卓越的耐磨擦、抗劃痕與抗刮傷性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 提供卓越的耐磨擦、抗劃痕與抗刮傷性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加滑爽性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Solvent based and energy curable coatings and inks.
recommended_system_type_zh: 溶劑型及能量固化塗料與油墨。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; soft touch coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和皮革）；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；觸感塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: A formulated wax composite that provides abrasion, scratch and rub resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds lubricity and a smooth feel. Maximum lubricity achieved after 12 to 24 hours.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: Easy to disperse fine powder that can be incorporated with high speed mixing.

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 一種特殊配製的複合蠟，可提供耐磨損、抗刮傷與抗擦傷性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加潤滑性與光滑手感。在 12 至 24 小時後達到最大潤滑效果。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: 易分散的細粉，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable coatings and inks.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化塗料與油墨。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and masonry); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和磚石）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；金屬粉末。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Not a microplastic per ECHA definitions.
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Imparts a high degree of lubricity and slip with rub and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Provides antiblocking properties. Gives long-lasting water beading and weather resistance to exterior alkyd-based stains.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts a high degree of lubricity and slip with rub and mar resistance. Consider MP-22C & MP-28C (spherical) for improved surface slip. Biodegradable to OECD 302C test standard.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 根據 ECHA 定義，不屬於微塑料。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 賦予高水平的潤滑性與滑爽性，並兼具抗擦傷與抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 提供抗粘連性能。為戶外醇酸基著色劑提供持久的撥水性與耐候性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予高水平的潤滑性與滑爽性，並兼具抗擦傷與抗劃痕性。若需更好的表面滑爽性，可考慮選用 MP-22C 和 MP-28C（球形）。符合 OECD 302C 測試標準的可生物降解特性。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable coatings and inks.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化塗料與油墨。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; seed coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；種子塗層。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Imparts excellent rub and mar resistance with good surface slip.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Provides excellent antiblocking properties. Good heat resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.apparent_hardness: Better resistance to solvent absorption and swelling when compared to Synthetic wax.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Imparts excellent rub and mar resistance with good surface slip.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 賦予優異的抗耐磨擦和抗劃痕性，並具備良好的表面滑爽性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 提供優異的抗粘連性能。具備良好的耐熱性。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 與合成蠟相比，具有更好的抗溶劑吸收與膨潤能力。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 賦予優異的抗耐磨擦和抗劃痕性，並具備良好的表面滑爽性。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

examples: 關西- 捲鋼塗料,PPG- 工業塗料
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable coatings and inks.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化塗料與油墨。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Imparts excellent abrasion, rub and mar resistance with good surface slip.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Provides excellent antiblocking properties. Adds heat resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.improved_extrusion_flow: High performance micronized polyethylene wax which provides a unique combination of surface slip, abrasion/rub resistance, and antiblocking.
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Imparts excellent abrasion, rub and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.apparent_hardness: Better resistance to solvent absorption and swelling when compared to Synthetic wax.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: High performance micronized polyethylene wax provides a unique combination of surface slip.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 賦予優異的耐磨損、抗擦傷和抗劃痕性，並具備良好的表面滑爽性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 提供優異的抗粘連性能。增加耐熱性。
performance_descriptions_zh.improved_extrusion_flow: 高性能微粉化聚乙烯蠟，提供表面滑爽性、耐磨/耐擦傷性以及抗粘連性的獨特結合。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 賦予優異的耐磨損、抗擦傷和抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 與合成蠟相比，具有更好的抗溶劑吸收與膨潤能力。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 高性能微粉化聚乙烯蠟提供獨特的表面滑爽性結合。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 賦予優異的耐磨損、抗擦傷 and 抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 與合成蠟相比，具有更好的抗溶劑吸收與膨潤能力。

examples: 貝格- 木器漆,Toyo Ink - 罐頭塗料
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and masonry); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和磚石）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Value engineered nanocomposite designed for surface durability and lubricity.
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Improves scratch, scuff and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Improves scratch, scuff and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Choose G grade for maximum gloss reduction and burnish resistance; choose XF grade for maximum gloss retention.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds surface slip and lubricity. Biodegradable to OECD 302C test standard. Not a microplastic per ECHA definitions.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 專為表面耐久性和潤滑性設計的經濟型奈米複合材料。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 提高抗刮傷、抗磨損與抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 提高抗刮傷、抗磨損與抗劃痕性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 選擇 G 級別可獲得最大的消光效果和抗拋光性；選擇 XF 級別可獲得最大的光澤保持力。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加表面滑爽性與潤滑性。符合 OECD 302C 測試標準的可生物降解特性。根據 ECHA 定義，不屬於微塑料。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Maximum scratch and scuff resistance with slip and lubricity. HDPE composite reinforced with 300 nm aluminum oxide nanoparticles (Mohs Hardness 9).
performance_descriptions_en.apparent_hardness: Easier-to-disperse nanotechnology in a safe, non-nano powder. Composite particle density maximizes efficiency and minimizes settling.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Maximum scratch and scuff resistance with slip and lubricity.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 有效替代 PTFE 添加劑。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 最大程度的抗刮傷及抗磨損性，並具備滑爽性與潤滑性。採用 300 奈米氧化鋁奈米顆粒（莫氏硬度 9）增強的高密度聚乙烯複合材料。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 在安全的非奈米粉末中採用更易分散的奈米技術。複合顆粒密度可最大程度地提高效率並減少沉降。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 最大程度的抗刮傷與抗磨損性，兼具滑爽性與潤滑性。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and leather); wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); interior and exterior can and container coatings; coil coatings; seed coatings.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金聯和皮革）；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；卷材塗料；種子塗層。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Carnauba wax composite reinforced with 300 nm aluminum oxide nanoparticles (Mohs Hardness 9) provides maximum scratch resistance with surface lubricity.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Also useful as an additive in seed coatings.
performance_descriptions_en.apparent_hardness: Easier-to-disperse nanotechnology in a safe, non-nano powder. Composite wax/aluminum oxide particle is less abrasive on processing equipment compared to free aluminum oxide.
performance_descriptions_en.matting_gloss_control: Does not adversely affect clarity or gloss.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Provides maximum scratch resistance with surface lubricity. Renewable Carbon Index >95%.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 有效替代 PTFE 添加劑。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用 300 奈米氧化鋁奈米顆粒（莫氏硬度 9）增強的巴西棕櫚蠟複合材料，提供最大程度的抗刮傷性與表面潤滑性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 也可用作種子塗層中的添加劑。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 在安全的非奈米粉末中採用更易分散的奈米技術。與游離氧化鋁相比，複合蠟/氧化鋁顆粒對加工設備的磨損更小。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 不會對透明度或光澤產生不利影響。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 提供最大程度的抗刮傷性與表面潤滑性。可再生碳指數 >95%。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

composition_zh: 高密度聚乙烯/亞乙基雙硬脂醯胺/氧化鋁
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; can, container, and coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；罐裝、容器和卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Maximum scratch resistance; equal to PE/PTFE additives.
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Highly engineered HDPE/EBS composite reinforced with 300 nm aluminum oxide nanoparticles (Mohs Hardness 9). Good abrasion resistance with slip and lubricity.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: Amide wax component provides excellent antiblocking and release properties.
performance_descriptions_en.apparent_hardness: Highly engineered composite provides maximum film hardness and toughness.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Good abrasion resistance with slip and lubricity. Ideal for can and container coatings; 21CFR 175.300 approved.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 極佳的抗刮傷性；效能等同於 PE/PTFE 添加劑。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用 300 奈米氧化鋁奈米顆粒（莫氏硬度 9）增強的 HDPE/EBS 複合材料。具有良好的耐磨損性、滑爽性和潤滑性。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 醯胺蠟成分提供優異的抗粘連和脫模性能。
performance_descriptions_zh.apparent_hardness: 高度工程化的複合材料可提供最大漆膜硬度與韌性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 良好的耐磨損性，兼具滑爽性與潤滑性。非常適合罐裝和容器塗料；通過 21CFR 175.300 認證。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic and metal); stains, sealers and varnishes; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; can, container, and coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料和金屬）；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；罐裝、容器和卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: HDPE composite reinforced with hard, inert ceramic microspheres and nanoceramic platelets. Improved Taber abrasion resistance when compared to PE/PTFE additives.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Provides slip and lubricity. Ideal for can and container coatings; 21CFR 175.300 approved.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 有效替代 PTFE 添加劑。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用堅硬、惰性的陶瓷微球和奈米陶瓷片增強的高密度聚乙烯複合材料。與 PE/PTFE 添加劑相比，提高了泰伯 (Taber) 耐磨損性。
performance_descriptions_zh.matting_gloss_control: 可與（顆粒較粗的）Polyfluo 900 進行對比。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 提供滑爽性與潤滑性。非常適合罐裝和容器塗料；通過 21CFR 175.300 認證。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

composition_zh: 亞乙基雙硬脂醯胺/陶瓷
recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; interior and exterior can and container coatings; powdered metals.
application_fields_zh: 木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；室內外罐裝和容器塗料；金屬粉末。

performance_descriptions_en.ptfe_alternative: Excellent scratch and abrasion resistance when compared to PTFE based additives. Not a microplastic per ECHA definitions.
performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: Amide wax composite reinforced with hard, inert ceramic microspheres.
performance_descriptions_en.block_resistance: High melting point to improve heat and block resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.metal_mark_resistance: Amide wax composite reinforced with hard, inert ceramic microspheres provides superior surface durability.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: Adds slip, release and lubricity with an excellent surface feel. Lowers COF.
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: 與 PTFE 基添加劑相比，具有優異的抗刮傷和耐磨損性。根據 ECHA 定義，不屬於微塑料。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 採用堅硬、惰性陶瓷微球增強的醯胺蠟複合材料。
performance_descriptions_zh.block_resistance: 高熔點可提高耐熱性和抗粘連性。
performance_descriptions_zh.metal_mark_resistance: 採用堅硬、惰性陶瓷微球增強的醯胺蠟複合材料，可提供卓越的表面耐久性。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: 增加滑爽性、脫模性和潤滑性，並提供極佳的表面手感。降低摩擦係數 (COF)。
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A

recommended_system_type_en: Water based, solvent based and energy curable.
recommended_system_type_zh: 水性、溶劑型和能量固化體系。
application_fields_en: Industrial coatings (including plastic, metal and masonry); architectural wall and trim paints; stains, sealers and varnishes; floor coatings; wood coatings; printing inks and OPV's (including flexo and gravure); powder coatings; coil coatings; rubber additives.
application_fields_zh: 工業塗料（包括塑料、金屬和磚石）；建築牆面與飾面漆；著色劑、封閉底漆和清漆；地板塗料；木器塗料；印刷油墨和上光油（包括柔印和凹印）；粉末塗料；卷材塗料；橡膠添加劑。

performance_descriptions_en.scratch_abrasion_resistance: High performance additive for maximizing surface abrasion resistance (Taber) and film toughness. Fortified with two types of hard, inert ceramic particles. Low density polyethylene provides superior surface toughness, durability and mar resistance.
performance_descriptions_en.improved_extrusion_flow: Easy to disperse fine powder that can be incorporated with high speed mixing.
performance_descriptions_en.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_en.texture_structure: N/A

performance_descriptions_zh.ptfe_alternative: Polyfluo 900 的無 PTFE 替代品。
performance_descriptions_zh.scratch_abrasion_resistance: 用於最大化表面耐磨損性 (Taber) 和漆膜韌性的高性能添加劑。採用兩種堅硬、惰性的陶瓷顆粒進行強化。低密度聚乙烯可提供卓越的表面韌性、耐用性和抗劃痕性。
performance_descriptions_zh.improved_extrusion_flow: 易分散的細粉，可透過高速攪拌混合引入。
performance_descriptions_zh.slip_lubricity: N/A
performance_descriptions_zh.texture_structure: N/A
